carplayAndroid.title: CarPlay & Android Auto
carplayAndroid.detailedDesc:
Carlink 2.0 Technology

Our products feature the latest Carlink 2.0 technology, supporting both wireless and wired connection methods for seamless smartphone integration with your car system.

Connection Methods

  • Wireless Connection: Wireless CarPlay/Android Auto via Bluetooth and Wi-Fi
  • Wired Connection: USB cable direct connection, stable and reliable

How It Works

For wireless connection, your phone first establishes initial pairing via Bluetooth, then automatically switches to Wi-Fi for high-speed data transmission, enabling smooth audio/video sync and touch response.

hdDisplay.title: HD Display
hdDisplay.detailedDesc:
IPS HD Display Technology

We use high-quality IPS (In-Plane Switching) panels to deliver an exceptional visual experience.

Display Advantages

  • Wide Viewing Angle: 178° ultra-wide viewing angle, clear from any angle
  • High Color Accuracy: Accurate and vibrant colors, natural and realistic images
  • High Contrast: Deep blacks and bright whites, distinct layers
  • Sunlight Readable: High brightness design, clearly visible even in strong outdoor light
  • Fast Response: Low latency display, smooth touch operation without ghosting

processor.title: 8-Core Processor
processor.detailedDesc:
8-Core High Performance Processor

Equipped with an 8-core high-performance processor, providing powerful performance for your car system.

Performance Advantages

  • Multitasking: Run navigation, music, calls and multiple apps simultaneously without lag
  • Fast Boot: Quick system startup, ready to use instantly
  • Smooth Animations: Silky smooth interface transitions, instant operation response
  • Efficient Decoding: Supports 4K video hardware decoding, plays HD videos effortlessly
  • Low Power Design: Smart scheduling, balancing performance and energy consumption

compatibility.title: Compatibility
compatibility.desc: Compatible with steering wheel buttons and rear camera
compatibility.detailedDesc:
Perfect OEM Function Compatibility

Our products are designed with full consideration for compatibility with original car systems, allowing you to retain convenient features while upgrading.

Steering Wheel Button Compatibility

Supports original steering wheel multifunction buttons, including volume control, track switching, voice control, answer/hang up calls, without changing your driving habits.

Reverse Camera Compatibility

Perfectly compatible with original reverse camera, automatically switches to reverse view when in reverse gear, with clear parking guidelines displayed for your driving safety.

Other Compatibility Features

  • Supports original USB ports
  • Compatible with original audio system
  • Retains original A/C display (select models)

touchscreen.desc: Crystal clear display with responsive touch

questions.q1: How to use the knowledge base?
questions.q4: How to confirm if the product is compatible with my vehicle?
questions.q5: Will the original factory functions be retained after installation?
questions.q6: Can the original rearview camera be retained?
questions.q7: Can the original microphone be retained?
questions.q8: Can the original USB function be retained?
questions.q12: What is the speaker power rating?

answers.a1: You can access the knowledge base through the navigation bar and use the search function to find the technical documents and tutorials you need.
answers.a2: Visit the software download page, select the software you need, and click the download button.
answers.a3: You can submit your questions through the contact us page, or use the feedback function to provide feedback directly.
answers.a4: Please send photos of your car's original head unit (front and back) to us, and we will confirm compatibility for you.
answers.a5: Most original factory functions can be retained.
answers.a6: Most vehicle models can retain the original camera. If uncertain, please contact us, or we recommend using our provided camera. Most original cameras are 480p, which may not provide good clarity after installation. Our cameras are AHD1080p.
answers.a8: Not necessarily retained, depends on the vehicle model. Please provide your vehicle information for confirmation.
answers.a9: 7-inch and 8-inch screens use IPS material, others use OLED.
answers.a10:
Screen resolutions by size:
• 7-inch/8-inch screens: 1024×600
• 12.3-inch screens: 1920×720
• 10.25-inch/10.4-inch screens: 1920×720
• 13.35-inch screens: 1920×720
answers.a11:
RAM (Random Access Memory):
• Temporary storage for running programs
• Determines system smoothness
• Data is lost when powered off
• Cannot be expanded

Storage (Internal Storage):
• Permanent storage for apps, files, media
• Determines how much content can be stored
• Data is retained when powered off
• Can be expanded via SD card

Analogy: RAM is like a desk workspace - the larger it is, the more tasks you can handle simultaneously; Storage is like a filing cabinet - the larger it is, the more files you can store.

audioEqualizer.title: EQ Adjustment Reference Tool
audioEqualizer.pageDescription: EQ reference test: this page offers 37 adjustable bands (~20 Hz–20 kHz). Head units and DSPs often use 5, 10, 31, or other counts—there is no universal “37-band maximum”; map these readings to the nearest bands on your hardware.

labels.outputLevelFriendlyHint: Watch the bar and the short message below—no technical units.
labels.meterLevelClipHint: Very loud — ease off the volume
labels.eqFilterActiveHint: Showing {{visible}} of {{total}} bands in this range (same splits as the summary: bass ≤250 Hz, mid 251 Hz–7.99 kHz, treble ≥8 kHz).
labels.eqHardwareBandsNote: Real devices use different band counts (often 5–31); this tool uses 37 reference points—not an industry-wide limit.

tips.eqAdjustment: Adjust bands here, then apply the same values on your device.
tips.howToUse: Play test audio → drag bands → note dB values for your hardware EQ.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to our website. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose and protect the information you provide when using our website and services.

provided.title: 2.1 Information You Provide
provided.desc: When you use our contact form, subscribe to newsletters or participate in other interactions, we may collect the following information:
items: Other information you choose to share with us

automatic.title: 2.2 Automatically Collected Information
automatic.desc: Our servers may automatically collect the following information:

usage.title: 3. Use of Information
usage.desc: We use the information collected for the following purposes:
items: Provide, maintain and improve our services
Respond to your inquiries and support requests
Provide you with relevant information and products
Improve user experience and website performance

security.title: 4. Information Security
security.desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. These measures include:

sharing.title: 5. Information Sharing
sharing.desc: We will not sell, trade or rent your personal information to third parties. We will only disclose your information in the following circumstances:
items: You explicitly consent to us doing so
Required by law or judicial proceedings
To maintain our terms of service and other agreements
To protect our, your or others' rights, privacy or safety

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your user experience. You can control the use of cookies through your browser settings.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.desc: Under applicable data protection laws, you may have the following rights:
items: Access personal information we hold about you
Restrict our use of your personal information
Obtain a copy of your personal information

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or concerns about how we handle your personal information, please contact us through the following:

changes.title: 9. Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the revised policy on the website and updating the 'Last Updated' date.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept these terms of service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use this website. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of this website indicates your acceptance of any modifications.

allowed: View information and documents on the website
prohibited: Copy or modify content on this website without permission
Use this website for any illegal or harmful activities
Attempt unauthorized access to any part of this website

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
ip.content: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, audio clips, digital downloads and data compilations, is the proprietary property of us or our content providers. This content is protected by copyright and other relevant intellectual property laws.

asIs.title: 4. Content Provided 'As Is'
asIs.content: Content and information on this website are provided 'as is'. We do not make any express or implied representations or warranties, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall we be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or services provided through this website, including but not limited to loss of profits or data.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third Party Links
thirdParty.content: This website may contain links to third party websites. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy or practices of these third party websites. You access third party websites at your own risk and must comply with their terms and conditions.

conduct.title: 7. User Conduct
conduct.desc: You agree not to on this website:
items: Post any illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing or derogatory content
Engage in spam, phishing or fraudulent activities
Upload viruses, malware or any other code that could harm computers
Interfere with or circumvent any security features of this website

account.title: 8. Account and Password
account.content: If this website provides user account features, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of account information and for all activities that occur under your account. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account.

termination.title: 9. Service Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or restrict your access to this website at any time for any reason or no reason. In such event, you are responsible for stopping use of the website and destroying any downloaded or printed copies of content.

We strive to ensure the accuracy and completeness of information, but we do not provide any warranties regarding its accuracy, completeness, timeliness or suitability.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.paragraph1: We are a leading manufacturer of premium aftermarket automotive electronics, specializing in wireless CarPlay, Android Auto, and touchscreen navigation systems. With years of industry experience, we deliver professional solutions to customers worldwide.
intro.paragraph2: Our products combine cutting-edge technology with OEM-quality manufacturing, ensuring seamless integration and reliable performance for your vehicle.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To provide innovative, high-quality automotive electronics that enhance the driving experience while maintaining the highest standards of safety and reliability.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the global leader in aftermarket automotive electronics, recognized for innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction.

capabilities.title: Our Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: From design to delivery, we control every step

founded.title: Company Founded
